localRuntime.title: Local Runtime
localRuntime.description: Paths are resolved in the Electron main process.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.description: Sessions currently launched and consuming resources.
sessions.emptyDescription: Launch a profile to see it here.

scheduler.title: Proxy Health Scheduler
scheduler.description: Periodically re-check every saved proxy in the background and store its health status.
scheduler.noteBody: This background task runs in the Electron main process, so checks will continue seamlessly even when the app is minimized or you are navigating between pages. Health results will be displayed directly as status badges inside the Proxy Pool.

remoteLogin.title: Remote login reminder
remoteLogin.desc: A reminder email is sent when your account is signed in from a new IP address instead of the 3 commonly used IPs.

failedLogin.title: Failed login attempt alert
failedLogin.desc: If login fails more than 3 times, a reminder email is sent to the Owner's email.

ipAllowlist.title: Login IP allowlist
ipAllowlist.desc: Once set, member login is restricted by IP (Owner not affected).

twoStep.title: Two-step verification
twoStep.desc: Sensitive actions require verification via an authenticator app, email, or SMS.
twoStep.levelLow: Low — new device or 90+ days since last 2FA

multiDevice.title: Multi-Device Mode
multiDevice.description: Control whether multiple members can access the same profile simultaneously.
multiDevice.modeFull: Full — all profiles support simultaneous access
multiDevice.hintBefore: When enabled, multiple members can access the same profile at the same time. In
multiDevice.hintAfter: mode, choose the eligible profiles from the Profiles page.

website.title: Website Management
website.description: URL access rules and resource loading.

blockAccess.title: Block access
blockAccess.desc: Use the blocklist and allowlist for URL management.

fbStatic.title: FB static resources
fbStatic.desc: When enabled, Facebook static resources load using the local network.

localNetwork.title: Local network access
localNetwork.desc: When enabled, specific URLs can be accessed on the local network.

customIcon.title: Custom icon
customIcon.desc: Show a custom icon for profiles in the list.

displayCustomNo.title: Display custom No.
displayCustomNo.desc: Show the full custom serial number (e.g. "123456").

displayLast4.title: Display last 4 digits of custom No.
displayLast4.desc: Show only the last 4 digits of the serial number.

ipSetting.title: IP Setting
ipSetting.description: Proxy auto-configuration priority and IP checker.
ipSetting.priorityChain: Last used IP > ASN > City > Region > Country/Region

dataSync.title: Data Sync
dataSync.description: Select the data to sync across devices.

browser.title: Browser Settings
browser.description: Behavior of the launched browser. Items marked “Applied at launch” take effect on the next profile launch.

geoMatch.title: Geo auto-match (timezone · locale · WebRTC)
geoMatch.desc: Derive each profile's timezone, language, and WebRTC exit IP from its proxy's location at launch. Turn off to use only each profile's manual values. Applied at launch.

realtimeTimezone.title: Real-time timezone match on dynamic IP change
realtimeTimezone.desc: Match the corresponding timezone and location when the dynamic IP changes.

chromeSignin.title: Allow Chrome sign-in
chromeSignin.desc: When off, you can sign in to Google sites like Gmail without signing in to Chrome itself.

offerTranslate.title: Offer to translate pages
offerTranslate.desc: Offer to translate pages that aren't in a language you read.

disableDevtools.title: Disable Browser Developer Tools
disableDevtools.desc: Writes a DeveloperToolsAvailability managed-policy file into each profile. Chromium enforces it once the file is registered in the OS managed-policy location (not applied machine-wide automatically).

lockExtensions.title: Disable installing/removing extensions
lockExtensions.desc: Writes an ExtensionInstallBlocklist managed-policy file per profile (the proxy-auth extension is unaffected). Enforced once registered in the OS managed-policy location.

virtualCamera.title: Virtual camera
virtualCamera.desc: Simulate local video as a live camera feed. Only valid for Chrome version 140 and above.

mobileSimulation.title: Mobile simulation optimization
mobileSimulation.desc: Make the interface closer to a real mobile device experience. Only valid for Chrome version 143 and above.

secureAccess.title: Secure access (HTTPS)
secureAccess.desc: Whenever possible, use HTTPS and get warned before loading non-HTTPS sites.

disableVideos.title: Disable loading videos
disableVideos.desc: Block media downloads to save proxy traffic.

disableImages.title: Disable loading images
disableImages.desc: Block image loading to save traffic. Note: image loading is disabled fully; the KB threshold below is stored for future per-request filtering.

performance.title: Performance
performance.description: Controls for launching many profiles at once — applied to bulk launches and the running-session ceiling.

parallelLimit.title: Parallel launch limit
parallelLimit.desc: How many profiles spawn at the same time during a bulk launch. Higher is faster but uses more RAM. Recommended 3–8.

maxRunning.title: Max running profiles
maxRunning.desc: Hard ceiling on profiles running at once (memory safety). Leave at 0 for unlimited; launches past the limit are blocked with a clear message.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: Restore your last session, recover crashed profiles, and protect against memory exhaustion when many profiles run at once.

restoreSession.title: Restore last session on startup
restoreSession.desc: When SoftGlaze reopens, offer to relaunch the profiles that were running when it last closed or crashed.

autoRestart.title: Auto-restart crashed profiles
autoRestart.desc: If a profile's browser crashes on its own, automatically relaunch it. Capped per profile so a persistently-crashing profile can't loop.

memoryGuard.title: Memory guard
memoryGuard.desc: When system memory runs low, automatically close the oldest running profiles until memory recovers. Off by default — it will never close a profile unless enabled.

smartAutofill.title: Smart Autofill
smartAutofill.description: The Identity Data Vault widget that detects signup forms in launched profiles and fills them from your saved personas.

enable.title: Enable Smart Autofill
enable.desc: Inject the autofill widget into launched profiles. On Chromium this uses the in-page bridge; turning this off skips injection entirely.

firefox.title: Firefox autofill
firefox.desc: Also install the autofill WebExtension into Firefox profiles (Firefox has no in-page bridge). Loads unsigned on Firefox Developer Edition / Nightly; release Firefox requires the Mozilla-signed build bundled with the installer.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.description: How long team activity and security events (member changes, sign-ins, permission edits) are kept before being pruned on startup.
audit.retentionDesc: Activity older than this is deleted when SoftGlaze starts. Set to 0 to keep the full history forever.

updates.title: Updates
updates.description: Check for and install app updates. Updates are signature-verified before they install.
updates.checkDefault: Check whether a newer version of SoftGlaze Browser is available.
updates.notEnabled: Automatic updates are not enabled in this build.
updates.available: Update {{version}} available — downloading in the background…

onStartup.title: On Startup
onStartup.description: What happens when a profile is launched.
onStartup.modeLast: Continue browsing the last opened page
onStartup.modeBlank: Do not start the proxy detection page (blank)

onlyWithProxy.title: Only open with an available proxy
onlyWithProxy.desc: If no proxy is found, the browser won't open. (Fingerprint items based on IP would otherwise not match.)

onlyWhenExtensionLoaded.title: Only open when extension data is loaded
onlyWhenExtensionLoaded.desc: Open the browser only when the extension data has successfully loaded.

blockIfCountryChanged.title: Block if country/region changed
blockIfCountryChanged.desc: Don't open the profile if the country/region differs from the last time it was opened.

captcha.title: Captcha Auto-Solving
captcha.description: Automatically solve reCAPTCHA v2 and hCaptcha during browsing using a paid third-party solver. This is separate from fingerprinting — a clean fingerprint reduces how often captchas appear, but solving them needs a paid service billed per solve by the provider (not by SoftGlaze).

enable.title: Enable captcha auto-solving
enable.desc: When on, launched profiles detect supported captchas and submit them to your solver automatically.

captcha.billedAnticaptcha: Stored locally in your settings DB. You are billed per solve by Anti-Captcha.
captcha.billed2captcha: Stored locally in your settings DB. You are billed per solve by 2captcha.

email.title: Email (verification codes)
email.description: SMTP for sending OTP codes at registration. Leave blank to run offline — the code is then shown in-app instead of emailed.
email.noSmtpYet: No SMTP configured yet — save your settings first.
